description: Unique equipment serial number (SN-XXXXX)

Human-readable equipment name
Equipment family: Filling, Processing, Downstream
Equipment sub-family
Customer identifier
Configuration characteristics (volume, cap_type, jaw_system, etc.). May be blank = missing data.
Active or Decommissioned
Last date config was physically verified. Stale = data quality risk.
Material Stockable number - the orderable, pre-configured kit variant
Material Configurable number - the umbrella parent kit
Kit sub-type: MK_Safety, MK_Corrective, MK_OnDemand, UK_Replacement, UK_Improvement, VCK
Equipment material number this MSTK is configured for
Specific config value this MSTK requires. ANY = matches all configs of that material.
Hard deadline for mandatory installation. Blank = no deadline.
Whether kit is bundled inside a Maintenance Unit (avoid double-ordering)
Whether kit is related to or affected by Volume Conversion
PREREQUISITE (must be installed first), INTERFERES_WITH (mutually exclusive), GROUP_WITH (batch together)
The kit that has the dependency
The kit that is depended upon or conflicts with
COMPLETED, PARTIALLY_INSTALLED, ORDERED_NOT_CONFIRMED, STATUS_UNKNOWN
Whether installed base was updated: Yes, Partial, No
Service order type - indirect evidence of kit activity
Free-text notes - may contain evidence of unreported kit installations
example: Installed kit per TB. Validated OK.

description: MSTK numbers referenced in service order. May not match installation records.
CLEAN (baseline), DEGRADED (data quality issues), EDGE_CASE (complex logic)
Easy (both systems solve), Medium (AI advantage), Hard (AI required)
